response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, cloud strategy leadership, and 15 years of experience, which the resume does not fully reflect in depth or seniority.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Open-source contributions and entrepreneurial projects (e.g., GISCollective)
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in AI platforms
Seniority appears below Director-level IC (no clear 15-year track record in strategic roles)
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI adoption at scale
